HeroBlock.title: Spark Change on Campus.
HeroBlock.subtitle: Join our university volunteer network. Build your skills, meet amazing people, and give back to the community in a meaningful way.
HeroBlock.marquee: VOLUNTEER • CONNECT • GROW • VOLUNTEER • CONNECT • GROW • VOLUNTEER • CONNECT • GROW •

ImpactPillarsBlock.sectionSubtitle: Whether you have a green thumb or just want to help out, there is a place for you to grow with us.

planting.title: Urban Planting
planting.desc: Greening our campus and city spaces, one seedling at a time. Join our weekend digs.

education.title: Eco-Education
education.desc: Hosting workshops and talks to spread awareness about sustainable living and local flora.

community.title: Community Hub
community.desc: Connecting students with local green initiatives. Building friendships through shared goals.

ImpactCounter.title: Small seeds, huge impact.
ImpactCounter.subtitle: Look at what we've accomplished together this semester. Every single pair of hands makes a difference.

social.title: Let's be friends.
social.subtitle: Follow our journey, tag us in your plant pics, and stay in the loop with daily campus updates.

join.title: Ready to dig in?
join.subtitle: We are always looking for passionate students to join our crew. Head over to our contact form to officially become a member!
